title: Give AI-built websites a real design with DESIGN.md
abstract: Elevate your AI-built websites with real design flair! "DESIGN.md" works its magic to transform your website from plain to polished. Just throw in a file, and let it do the rest—watch your site go from ordinary to impressive in an instant. Give it a try and become the unseen design whiz everyone talks about!
abstract_zh: 给你的网站来点实际的设计感吧！“DESIGN.md”就像魔法一样，把AI建的网站变成活生生的设计作品。你只需要一个文件，剩下的交给它，让你的网站瞬间从平庸变得高大上！快来试试，让所有人都知道你是设计界的隐形高手！
